executive_summary: We identified 100 cloud resources representing $21,290.72 in monthly spend and $255,488.64 annually. Potential recoverable savings are $11,871.36/month ($142,456.32/year). 44 resources are classified as low-risk remediation candidates.
key_findings: 20 resources flagged as critical or high savings opportunities.
44 resources are safe to remediate immediately.
$11,871.36/month in savings requires only low-risk actions.
top_cost_drivers: Underutilized compute resources with high waste scores.
Zombie instances incurring cost without productive utilization.
Resources with safe remediation status driving immediate savings potential.
recommended_actions: Schedule manual review for 36 medium-risk resources.
Defer action on 20 high-risk production resources.
risk_considerations: 20 resources require do-not-remediate status due to operational risk.
36 resources need stakeholder approval before changes.
Savings estimates assume successful rightsizing or termination of idle resources.
